entities.name: Sample Project
observations: This is a sample project for demonstration purposes
Created to show the expected JSON format for the graph visualization
Contains various entity types and relations

entities.name: Frontend Component
observations: User interface component built with Vue.js
Handles user interactions and data visualization

entities.name: Backend Service
observations: RESTful API service built with Node.js
Connects to the database for persistent storage

entities.name: Database
observations: Contains tables for users, products, and orders

entities.name: Authentication Module
observations: Implements JWT for secure token-based authentication

entities.name: API Documentation
observations: Comprehensive documentation of the API endpoints
